---
title: "MainTitle"
author: "hoyongj"
format: html
date: now
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    error: true
---

## 1.


```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: true
title: "MainTitle"
subtitle: "SubTitle"
author: "YourName"
format: html
date: now
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    error: true
```


## 2.

```{r}
undefined_function()
```

## 3.

```{r}
1+1
```
